_doc: Every bridge/shim/wrapper file must be listed here with why it still exists and its expiry rule. Pure forwarders without external callers should be deleted instead of preserved.

layers.reason: Generates the public i/ shim files from i_registry.json.
layers.expires: none while i/ surface is generated

layers.reason: Claude/Codex hook bridge into the portable event kernel.
layers.expires: none while external hook CLIs call this boundary

layers.reason: Lifecycle adapter boundary for portable hook dispatch.
layers.expires: none while proxy lifecycle events enter here

layers.reason: Middleware adapter for filesystem-backed subagent result pickup.
layers.expires: replace when all agents write the canonical agent-job contract directly

layers.reason: Sourced helper keeps old safety include stable while worker absorbs shim endpoints.
layers.expires: delete after no hook sources this file

layers.reason: Historical import path while TodoWrite replacement settles.
layers.expires: delete after import scan has zero todo_spec_bridge references

layers.reason: Bridge is a domain concept here, not a compatibility layer.
Bridge is a domain concept here, not a compatibility layer.
